title: Bot
description: An Amazon Lex V2 bot for building conversational interfaces.

botId.description: The unique identifier assigned to the bot.

botName.description: The name specified for the bot.

botStatus.description: The current status of the bot.

roleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the role assumed by the bot.

creationDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time the bot was created.

lastUpdatedDateTime.description: A timestamp of the date and time the bot was last updated.
